/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdave_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdave_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dave_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dave_interfaces/msg/detail/bearing__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dave_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dave_interfaces/msg/detail/position__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dave_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dave_interfaces/srv/detail/get_set_nav__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
